title: Wanderers
description: Lightweight modpack focusing of immersiveness and fun! Originally created for the Expritan Network.
body:
**Modpack Description**

The Minecraft experience, packed with fun automation, immersive exploration, and enhanced performance. This modpack is centered exploring and viewing the minecraft world in a new and immersive way and is accompanied by supporting mods to make the experience more fun, less grindy and generally more fun!

### Key Features

- **Creative Contraptions**  
  The Create Mod with many addons to pump it with the most crazy features available!

- **Experimental Experiences**  
  With Create Interactive and Clockwork the create machines get even crazier and it is balanced in such a way that it should not be annoying (like trains derailing)

- **Beautiful Biomes**  
  A plethora of new biomes has been added thanks to different worldgen mods

- **Optimal Optimizations**  
  Performance boosting mods included and fully compatible!
